title: Blåhaj
body:
### Features

- Craft the blåhaj, or one of the other variants.
- Put a blåhaj on your head
- Dual wield blåhaj?
- Place your blåhaj on your beds (drop onto bed, and it places itself)

- Dyable blåhaj


### How to install
**Datapack** (recommended)
  1. Put the [Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blahai/version/latest?loader=datapack) zip file into the `/datapack` of your minecraft world folder
  1. Put the required [Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blahai/version/latest?loader=datapack) zip file into your resource pack folder of your minecraft installation.
2. Done 🦈

**Mod** (Fabric, Forge, NeoForge or Quilt)
  1. Normally just to put the  [Mod](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blahai/version/latest?loader=fabric) jar file in the `/mods` foder in your minecraft installation.
2. Done 🦈
   
![Blåhaj Render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bd1f91c2f279357cb1c29720a849b50cbb4abc7_0.webp)
